title.v: bút toán kết chuyển tự động

footer.v: 1 - Tk có sang tk nợ, 2 - Tk nợ sang tk có, 3 - Lãi hoặc lỗ, 4 - Thuế GTGT
footer.e: 1 - Cr.Account to Dr.Account, 2 - Dr.Account to Cr.Account, 3 - P&L, 4 - VAT

header.v: Chỉ kết chuyển các phát sinh chi tiết

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số thứ tự %s đã có trong khai báo các bút toán kết chuyển tự động.' else N'The order number %s already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số thứ tự %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The order number %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Số thứ tự %s đã có phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete the order number %s. It has already been used.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where stt = @stt) begin select 'stt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@stt)) as message return end if @kc_vv_yn = 0 and @kc_kh_yn = 0 and @kc_sp_yn = 0 and @kc_bp_yn = 0 and @kc_lsx_yn = 0 and @kc_hd_yn = 0 and @kc_ku_yn = 0 and @kc_phi_yn = 0 and @kc_td1_yn = 0 and @kc_td2_yn = 0 and @kc_td3_yn = 0 select @kc_ct_yn = 0 select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where stt = $stt.OldValue) begin select 'stt' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($stt.OldValue)) as message return end
if @stt <> $stt.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where stt = @stt and stt <> $stt.OldValue) begin select 'stt' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@stt)) as message return end end

update @@table set kc_ct_yn = 0 where stt = @stt and kc_vv_yn = 0 and kc_kh_yn = 0 and kc_sp_yn = 0 and kc_bp_yn = 0 and kc_lsx_yn = 0 and kc_hd_yn = 0 and kc_ku_yn = 0 and kc_phi_yn = 0 and kc_td1_yn = 0 and kc_td2_yn = 0 and kc_td3_yn = 0 update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt = @stt

declare @stt_rec varchar(33) select @stt_rec = stt_rec from dmkc where stt = @stt select stt_rec01 as stt_rec into #rec from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec01 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec02 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec02 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec03 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec03 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec04 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec04 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec05 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec05 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec06 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec06 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec07 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec07 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec08 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec08 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec09 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec09 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec10 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec10 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec11 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec11 <> '' insert into #rec select stt_rec12 from dmkc1 where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec12 <> ''
if exists(select 1 from ct00 with(index(stt_rec)) where exists(select 1 from #rec where #rec.stt_rec = ct00.stt_rec)) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@stt)) as message return end
